description_long: This is a sleek, dark-colored military jet aircraft with a long, slender fuselage and sharply tapered wings. The wings are straight and extend widely from the body, with visible hardpoints for external stores or fuel tanks. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer at the tail and a conventional tailplane configuration. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a streamlined canopy. The landing gear is visible in the down position, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage.
description: A dark, streamlined military jet with wide straight wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, and wing-mounted stores.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, straight wing shape, and tail configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with visible external stores and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit canopy, and the wide straight wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-aspect-ratio, straight mid-wing configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
